reviews.comment:
Mal atendidos, tuvimos que preguntar si había promoción cosa que en otras ypf te lo ofrecen de entrada, empleado muy asqueroso. No voy mas

(Translated by Google)
Poor service. We had to ask if there was a promotion, which other YPF stores offer right away. The employee was very disgusting. I'm not going back.

reviews.comment:
Cómo siempre excelente lo único que veo que le faltaría es un supermercado lugar tiene para poner y por supuesto que no se abusen con los precios porque fuera de temporada no hay tanto tránsito pero en verano no cabe un alfiler.

(Translated by Google)
As always, excellent. The only thing I see that it's missing is a supermarket; it has the space to put one, and of course, they shouldn't overcharge because out of season there isn't much traffic, but in summer it's packed.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPeGRuTXV3RRAB
